summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4 new features added to Retail Book web app: Item editing/deletion, PDF invoice generation, Search & filtering, and Reports & analytics. All backend APIs (13/13 new endpoints) and frontend functionality working perfectly. Minor chart rendering warnings in Reports page but functionality is intact.

design_issues.issue: Chart rendering warnings in console about width/height being -1
design_issues.note: Charts display correctly despite console warnings

design_issues.issue: Emergent badge intercepts clicks on pagination buttons
design_issues.note: Pagination works but requires force clicks due to overlay

passed_tests: All 13 new backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Item edit (PUT /api/items/{id}) - updates price, qty, discount and recalculates fabric_amount
Item delete (DELETE /api/items/{id}) - removes item with confirmation modal
PDF invoice (GET /api/invoice?ref=XX) - generates valid PDF files (2634+ bytes)
Search by query (GET /api/search?q=Ambala) - returns 50 matching results
Search with filters (customer=Cash, payment_status=Settled) - returns 92 filtered results
Reports summary (GET /api/reports/summary) - returns total_fabric, payment_modes, article_types
Revenue reports (daily/monthly) - returns 12 daily and 1 monthly data points
Customer report - returns 44 customers ranked by revenue (top: Cash ₹165,891)
Frontend: Manage Items page loads with edit/delete/PDF buttons (30 each)
Frontend: Search page with advanced filters (customer, date range, amount, payment status)
Frontend: Reports page with 3 tabs (Revenue, Customers, Breakdown) and 6 summary cards
Frontend: Sidebar shows new nav items (Manage Items, Search, Reports) below divider
Frontend: PDF download links work from both Items Manager and Search results
Frontend: Edit mode activates with save/cancel buttons, delete shows confirmation modal
Frontend: Search filters work correctly (Cash customers, Settled payments, date ranges)
Frontend: Customer ranking table shows 44 customers with revenue breakdown
Frontend: Charts display payment mode distribution and article type breakdown

success_percentage.backend: 100% (32/32 tests passed including 13 new feature tests)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core functionality working, minor chart rendering warnings)
